title: The Ancient Artifacts of Gobekli Tepe

scenes.text: An ancient temple older than Stonehenge confounds archaeologists.
Located in southeastern Turkey, Gobekli Tepe is over 11,000 years old.
Discovered in the 1990s, it's thought to be the world’s oldest known temple.
The site reveals complex carvings and structures, yet many questions persist.
What was its true purpose? Rituals or something else?
scenes.label: PURPOSE STILL QUESTIONED

scenes.text: Follow if the unknown keeps you up at night.

description: 📍 Gobekli Tepe, Turkey - 1990s. An ancient site dating back over 11,000 years has changed what we know about human history. Follow for daily mysteries!
